name: research_ethics_predictive_queue_begins_mesa_jus_mer
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics predictive queue begins mesa jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ravi Santos
agents.identity: I am Ravi Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Petrov
agents.identity: I am Ravi Petrov, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ravi Santos must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Ravi Santos do?
